name: Koulourakia Me Sousame (Sesame Cookies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift 10 cups of flour into a bowl and mix in the baking powder.
2. In a separate pan, brown the butter until it begins to smoke.
3. Add the browned butter to the flour mixture and make a well.
4. Cool slightly.
5. Rub four eggs and the butter between your palms until well blended.
6. Make another well in the flour mixture and add the warm milk; mix thoroughly.
7. Beat the eggs and sugar in another bowl until thick, then add them to the flour mixture.
8. Add the vanilla extract.
9. Knead the dough until it is soft.
10. Roll out or pat into shapes on a floured surface.
11. Shape the cookies as desired and roll each one in sesame seeds.
12. Bake on a buttered baking sheet in a preheated 350°F oven for 20 minutes.
